creator: peter.thoenen@protonmail.com
text:
cokane huh ;)

Patch is approved.  I will also send this over to the gpsmap developer 
as this particular option was a request from a kismet user (e.g. I told 
him if I was going to add it to the port, he was going to have to 
maintain this particular function).  Will have him take a look into:

"In addition, a number of other type-size and signed-ness warnings will
be spit out by the compiler, and should be looked into."

Thanks much for the patch
